title: AI Security Institute – Frontier AI Trends report factsheet
body: "The UK AI Security Institute (AISI) has conducted evaluations of frontier AI systems since November 2023 across domains critical to national security and public safety. The AI Security Institute – Frontier AI Trends report presents our first public analysis of the trends we’ve observed. It seeks to provide accessible, data-driven insights into the frontier of AI capabilities and promote a shared understanding among governments, industry, and the public.  This factsheet provides further information about the report.  "
